title: Argoman the Fantastic Superman
writer: Dino Verde, Vincenzo Mannino, John Davis Hart
actors: Roger Browne, Dominique Boschero, Eduardo Fajardo
plot: Argoman is practically invincible with powers beyond the scope of mortal man but loses his power once he engages sexual intercourse with a woman. Just when he lost his powers, the amazon queen Jenabell tries to conquer the world.
